MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/PETITIONER MICHAEL GARCIA Petition To Compel Arbitratiion And Appointment Of Arbitrator:
APPEAR: Lawrence Mann, Esq. 552-7707 for pltf/petitioner & moving party; J. John Kelly III, Esq. 510/521-0612 for Farmers Insurance Exchange.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED). Court appoints Retired Judge Alfred Chiantelli as arbitrator. Order signed in open court. (If Judge Chiantelli unable to accept assignment then Court appoints Retired Judge Isabella Grant.) (302/AJR/ju) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
